message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceParticipant underline false
skinparam sequenceParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E6
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderColor #666666
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #999999
skinparam sequenceArrowColor #333333

participant ConnectInterceptor
participant StreamAllocation
participant RealConnection
participant Http2Connection
participant CallServerInterceptor
participant Http2Codec
participant Http2Writer
participant Sink
participant Socket
participant ReaderRunnable
participant Http2Read
participant Http2Stream
participant Source

ConnectInterceptor -> StreamAllocation : newStream
StreamAllocation -> RealConnection : connect
RealConnection -> Http2Connection : start()
CallServerInterceptor -> Http2Codec : writeRequestHeaders
Http2Codec -> Http2Connection : newStream
Http2Connection -> Http2Writer : synStream
Http2Writer -> Sink : write
Sink -> Socket
Http2Codec -> Sink : write
Http2Connection -> ReaderRunnable : execute()
ReaderRunnable -> Http2Read : nextFrame()
Http2Read -> Http2Connection : handle
Http2Connection -> Http2Stream : receiveXXX()
Http2Stream -> Source : read()
Source -> Socket

@enduml
